---
title: "ChatGPT vs. the Winograd Schema Challenge."
description: "ChatGPT fails classic commonsense coreference problems from the Winograd Schema Challenge."
author: synesis
date: "2022-12-03"
categories: [ChatGPT, NLP, NLU, AI, commonsense]
image: fig1-winograd-challenge.jpg
---

![](fig1-winograd-challenge.jpg)

![](fig2-winograd-challenge.jpg)

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_chatgpt-nlp-nlproc-activity-7004894273783443457-a9om).*
